why: The prime guest app shows activity finish times based on a fixed 2-hour assumption. Staff-run activities vary in length. Without a configurable duration field, every activity incorrectly shows the same finish time, and the live/ended lifecycle is wrong for any activity that is not exactly 2 hours.

intended_outcome.statement: Activity finish times and lifecycle states reflect the real planned duration stored per instance, defaulting to 120 minutes when no duration is set.
